instructionalDaysDescription: calculated from the published WJCC Schools calendar
seoDescription: View the WJCC Schools Calendar 2026-2027 with Aug 24 first day, Jun 9 last day, WJCC school holidays, winter break, spring break, early release dates, PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: Williamsburg-James City County Public Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 24, 2026. Winter Break runs December 21-31, Spring Break runs April 5-9, and the last day of school is June 9, 2027. The calendar also lists CLP days, family conferences, marking period starts, early releases, holidays, and make-up day notes.

customSections.label: 2026-2027 WJCC School Calendar at a Glance
customSections.content: Use this quick summary for the most-searched WJCC Schools Calendar 2026-2027 dates before reviewing the full list.

customSections.label: Planning Around the WJCC School Calendar
customSections.content: Families planning vacations, childcare, transportation, appointments, and school activities should pay close attention to the WJCC 2026-2027 school calendar. Winter Break is the longest mid-year break, Spring Break falls in early April before the final weeks of school, and several student holidays or early release dates may affect only certain grade spans. The calendar is especially useful for Williamsburg and James City County families comparing districtwide dates with school-level activities, bell schedules, and program calendars.

groups.label: Family Travel and Breaks
items: Winter Break runs December 21-31, 2026, followed by New Year's Day on January 1, 2027.
Spring Break runs April 5-9, 2027, before the final quarter of the WJCC school year.
Thanksgiving Break runs November 25-27, 2026.

groups.label: Childcare and Transportation
items: CLP days, family conference days, and student holidays may require childcare even when staff are working.
Early release dates are labeled by grade span, so families should confirm dismissal times with the assigned school.
Weather make-up day decisions can change practical schedules and should be verified through WJCC Schools.

groups.label: Appointments and School Activities
items: Family conference student holidays on November 2-3, 2026 can affect attendance planning even though they are not traditional holiday breaks.
Marking period start dates help families track academic checkpoints during the WJCC school year.
June early release dates are split by grade span, so high school families and elementary families may need different pickup plans.

customSections.label: Understanding WJCC Calendar Dates
customSections.content: Not every WJCC calendar date affects all students in the same way. Some dates are districtwide school holidays, some are student holidays while staff are working, and some are early release dates that vary by grade span. Reading these labels carefully helps families avoid confusing a staff CLP day, a family conference day, or a grade-specific early release with a full districtwide break.

groups.label: Student Holiday vs. CLP Day
items: A student holiday means students do not attend school, but staff may still report for conferences, professional learning, or planning.
CLP days are staff learning or planning days and can be listed for all students or for specific grade spans such as PK-5.

groups.label: Early Release Dates
items: Early release dates shorten the student day rather than closing school for the full day.
WJCC labels early release dates by grade span, including PK-12, K-12 with PK student holiday, and grades 9-12 on different dates.

groups.label: Instructional Days
items: The 180-day figure on this page is a calculated count from the published WJCC calendar records, not a separate official certification.
Weather closures, make-up days, and district decisions can change the practical schedule after publication.

customSections.label: Important Calendar Notes for WJCC Families
customSections.content: The WJCC calendar includes several schedule labels that are useful for families but easy to miss when reading a PDF quickly.

groups.label: Early Release
items: WJCC early release dates may apply to PK-12, K-12 with PK student holiday, or grades 9-12 depending on the date.
Families should check school-level dismissal times because early release schedules can vary by grade span and campus.

groups.label: CLP Days
items: CLP days are staff professional learning or planning days and may appear as student holidays on the calendar.
Some CLP dates are listed specifically for PK-5 students, so families should read the grade span carefully.

groups.label: Make-up Days
items: Weather-related closures or district decisions may change the practical school schedule.
WJCC Schools remains the source of record for make-up day changes, revised PDFs, and school-specific announcements.

customSections.label: WJCC Calendar Dates Families Often Miss
customSections.content: These dates are easy to overlook because they are not all traditional holidays or full districtwide breaks.

groups.label: Frequently Missed Dates
items: September 25 and December 11, 2026 are listed as PK-5 student holiday/staff CLP days.
November 2-3, 2026 are student holidays for family conferences.
April 2, 2027 is listed as Early Release - K-12; PK Student Holiday.
June 4 and June 7, 2027 are early release dates for grades 9-12.
June 8-9, 2027 are early release dates for Pre-K-12, with June 9 also listed as the last day of school.

customSections.label: WJCC Calendar 2026-2027 vs 2025-2026
customSections.content: Compare the current WJCC academic calendar with the previous and next school years. These year-to-year dates help families see whether school starts earlier, spring break shifts, the final day changes, or the listed instructional-day count differs from the current year.

rows: Not separately calculated on this page

customSections.label: WJCC Calendar Update History
customSections.content: This update history records when the WJCC Schools Calendar 2026-2027 page was checked or materially changed on MySchoolDates. It helps families understand when the page was last compared with the official district source and what changed in the published reference page.

groups.label: July 20, 2026
items: Initial 2026-2027 WJCC calendar page published from the official Williamsburg-James City County Public Schools calendar source.
Key dates checked against the official WJCC calendar PDF, including first day, last day, Winter Break, Spring Break, Thanksgiving Break, early release dates, and CLP day labels.
Calendar import file generated from the checked page records for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, and other ICS-compatible calendar apps.

groups.label: Future Updates
items: If WJCC Schools revises the official calendar, MySchoolDates will update affected dates and refresh the page review date after checking the public district source.
Weather closures, emergency schedule changes, school-specific activities, and bell schedule changes should still be confirmed directly with WJCC Schools.

customSections.label: WJCC Calendar Source and Sync Notes
customSections.content: This WJCC Schools calendar page was last reviewed against the official Williamsburg-James City County Public Schools calendar source on July 20, 2026. MySchoolDates is an independent planning reference, not an official WJCC Schools website, and the district remains the source of record for revisions, emergency changes, school-specific schedules, and make-up day decisions.

groups.label: What Families Should Verify
items: Check the official WJCC calendar page before making travel, childcare, or transportation commitments.
The .ics calendar file is a one-time import generated from reviewed records and will not automatically update if WJCC Schools revises the calendar.
Early release times, CLP day effects, program calendars, and campus events can vary by grade span or school.

calendarFaqs.q: When does WJCC start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Monday, August 24, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is WJCC Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 5 through Friday, April 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When does WJCC Winter Break start in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: WJCC Winter Break starts Monday, December 21, 2026. The listed winter break runs through Thursday, December 31, 2026, followed by New Year's Day on January 1, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for WJCC in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Wednesday, June 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are in the WJCC 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: This page calculates 180 currently scheduled instructional days from the published WJCC Schools calendar records. Families should confirm any revisions with WJCC Schools.

calendarFaqs.q: Which WJCC dates are PK-5 CLP student holidays in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The calendar lists September 25 and December 11 as PK-5 student holiday/staff CLP days.

calendarFaqs.q: Are WJCC schools closed on Labor Day 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Labor Day is listed on Monday, September 7, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Does WJCC have early release days in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The WJCC calendar lists early release dates on April 2, June 4, June 7, June 8, and June 9, 2027, with grade-span notes on several dates.

calendarFaqs.q: When do WJCC students return after Winter Break?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break ends December 31, 2026, and New Year's Day is listed on January 1, 2027. Families should confirm the first return day after the holiday weekend with WJCC Schools.

calendarFaqs.q: Does the WJCC calendar change for weather closures?
calendarFaqs.a: Weather closures, make-up days, and district updates can change the practical school schedule. Families should verify final changes with WJCC Schools.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 24, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school is June 9, 2027.
